name: Cooler Master MWE Gold V3 ATX 3.1 Non-Modular 550W Power Supply - 80 PLUS Gold Certified - DC-to-DC Technology - 2 EPS Connectors - 120mm Quiet HDB Fan - 2x PCIe 6+2-Pin Connectors (MPE-5502-ACAAG-3BUS)
